product_name: M10 Air buds Wireless Bluetooth EarBuds Stereo Earphones with Power bank Bluetooth Ear phone Ear Buds Airdots Premium Quality For All Smart Phones
description: NOTE: As soon as you receive your pair of these Wireless Earbuds, please keep it on charge with the cable that comes with it for 4-5 hours (for first time only when you unbox) نوٹ: جیسے ہی آپ کو آپ کے وائرلیس ایربڈز موصول ہوتے ہیں ، براہ کرم اسے 4-5 گھنٹے (صرف پہلی بار) آنے والی کیبل سے چارج کریں۔ Product Specification: 1. Model: RAVE BT 2. Bluetooth specification: V5.1 3. Bluetooth Profile: A2DP, AVRCP, HFP; HSP 4. Working voltage: 3.1V~4.2V 5. Charging voltage: 5V-1A 6. Battery capacity of the headset: 50MAH 7. Battery capacity of the storage box: 2000MAH 8. Transmission distance :> 10M 9. Call time: 5-6h 10. Play time: 5-6h 11. Waterproof: IPX7 12. Charging time of headset: 1 h 13. Charging time of the Charging box: 2h 14. Support system: All Bluetooth devices, smart phones,tablets, PCs, support IOS, Android, windows Products include 1 * One pair of Bluetooth headsets 1 * Charging box 1 * Charging cable 1 * User Manual 4 * Ear cap

*Key Features:*

- *Impressive Sound Quality*: Rich, immersive audio with clear highs and deep bass, thanks to 10mm speaker drivers.
- *Long Battery Life*: Up to 5 hours of uninterrupted playback, with an additional 20-26 hours of battery life from the charging case.
- *Water Resistance*: IPX5 or IPX7 waterproof rating, making them perfect for workouts, rainy days, or intense activities.
- *Gaming Mode*: Low-latency performance for a lag-free gaming experience.
- *Convenience*: Reverse charging capability, allowing you to charge your phone or other devices on the
